failedAssertions.reason: TF aggregator does not implement partial bar guard. aggregate() emits all clock-aligned groups regardless of constituent 1m bar count. The first 5m window at 17:04 with only 1 constituent bar (instead of 5) is included rather than discarded. Note: VAL-DATA-002 expects 1440 5m bars which includes this partial bar — implementing the guard may change the expected count.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: python-check section with testing instructions, key imports, isolation rules for flow validator subagents
